eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Churchill; Clark; Douglas; Elko; Esmeralda; Eureka; Humboldt; Lander; Lincoln; Lyon; Mineral; Nye; Pershing; Storey; Washoe; White Pine; Carson City, NV; at 8:39 AM on JUL 10, 2019 Effective until 9:39 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
